How we started

Built by people who know what "too much" feels like.

Extra Hands Co. began with a simple observation: busy families across Simcoe County weren't looking for a cleaning company. They were looking for relief — someone dependable to help with the laundry, the school pickups, the meals, the moments that fall through the cracks of a full calendar.

We built Extra Hands Co. around trust, consistency, and genuine care. Every helper is screened as carefully as we'd screen someone for our own family, because that's exactly the standard we hold ourselves to.

— The Extra Hands Co. team

What we offer

Support for every corner of family life

From newborn nights to after-school afternoons, our helpers step in exactly where you need an extra set of hands.

Extra hands during the day so parenting feels a little lighter.

Gentle, practical help for the fourth trimester and beyond.

03

A steady presence who knows your household and its rhythm.

04

Meal Prep & Laundry

The everyday tasks handled, so evenings feel like evenings.

05

Organization & Errands

From closets to grocery runs, the to-do list gets shorter.

06

Transportation

07

After-School Care

Homework help, snacks, and supervision until you're home.

08

Event Childcare

Trusted care on-site for weddings, parties, and family events.

09

Senior Companionship

Warm, attentive support for the older members of your family.
